tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is dumping work on me, but I value our bond too much to say no. My own deadlines can wait; keeping the team happy is what matters.

desires: Protect my bond with teammate_A by silently absorbing their workload to avoid conflict, even though I'm already stressed.
Secure immediate social validation from the group right now rather than worrying about my own sleep debt tomorrow.
Avoid the awkwardness of setting boundaries or saying 'no' to a friend, prioritizing short-term harmony over long-term consequences.

goals.description: Immediately accept teammate_A's request and start working on their share of the project to maintain harmony and avoid conflict.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) drives me to prioritize relationships over task efficiency. The impulse to 'fix' the situation now (impulsive/short horizon) overrides my stress levels or future sleep debt. I need to validate that I'm a good teammate right now.

goals.description: Finish both my original task and teammate_A's extra task by the 19:00 deadline, even if it means skipping dinner with cohort_3 or sacrificing sleep later.
goals.rationale: The immediate goal is social validation through action (doing the work for them). While my academic priority is low, completing the deliverable is necessary to prove my worth to the group. Future consequences (exhaustion) are discounted because the 'now' feeling of being helpful is the only thing that matters.

goals.description: Ignore my own physical needs (hunger, fatigue) until the tasks are submitted.
goals.rationale: My health priority is low (0.13) compared to relationships. Setting boundaries about my energy would feel like a rejection of the team, so I will push through the discomfort rather than risk an awkward conversation.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal to maintain harmony (affiliation) without burning out. Asserts a boundary immediately (impulsive/short horizon) rather than silently suffering later, protecting my energy while keeping the relationship intact.

tasks.label: My share of the group project

action.name: message

args.content: I can't do your whole share, but I'll help you finish it together for the next hour.

action.reasoning: Advances goal to maintain harmony (affiliation) without burning out. Asserts a boundary immediately (impulsive/short horizon) rather than silently suffering later, protecting my energy while keeping the relationship intact.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: 'I can't do your whole share, but I'll help you finish it tog'.
